title: Separatist (disambiguation)
content:
'''Separatist''' could refer to

==Canon==
*'''[[Confederacy of Independent Systems]]''', commonly known as the '''Separatists''' or the '''Separatist Alliance''', a secessionist government
**'''[[Separatist holdouts]]''', remnants of the Confederacy of Independent Systems after the latter [[Mission to Mustafar|collapse]]
*'''[[Neo-Separatist Coalition]]''', a coalition of separatist groups led by [[Anto Kreegyr]]
*'''[[Separatist Coalition]]''', an organization [[Mon Mothma]] was a part of
*'''[[New Separatist Union]]''', an ambitious [[The galaxy|galactic]] government

==Legends==
*'''[[Mantellian Separatist Movement]]''', organization formed on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] in opposition to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]
*'''[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]''', commonly known at the '''Separatists''' or the '''Separatist Alliance''', a secessionist government
**'''[[Separatist holdouts/Legends|Separatist holdouts]]''', remnants of the Confederacy of Independent Systems after the latter [[Mission to Mustafar/Legends|collapse]]

*'''[[United Separatists]]''', a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] political faction
*'''[[Quinlan Vos's Separatist spy network]]''', organization formed by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] and [[Tholme/Legends|Tholme]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]
*'''[[Onderon separatists]]''', organization working with the [[Sith Triumvirate|Sith]] before [[3951 BBY]]

==Out of universe==
*'''[[The Separatists (reference book)|''The Separatists'']]''', a [[Star Wars Encyclopedia (series)|''Star Wars Encyclopedia'']] reference book

{{Disambig}}
